semantic_freeze.rule: No new syntax until regression suite is 100% stable

history.summary: MVP — lexer, parser, transpiler, runner, mod system, CLI
Deterministic plugin loader, middleware override chain, --show-python, version checks
All missing commands, @http.*, @store.*, inline @commands, auto-imports, line numbers
Semantic stabilization: unified _eval_value, ; enforcement, semantics.md, line map fix
SyntaxEngine: unified argument parsing. Fixed list/dict literals in @var. spec/architecture.md
Namespace runtime system. NamespaceCallNode. ModAPI.namespace()/require(). DependencyResolver. __ns__ in exec(). Example discord mod.
v0.9a: Namespace isolation. access_state/write_state/allow_peer. No AST/parser/transpiler changes.
v0.9b: Minimal async runtime. Runner detects async def main and appends asyncio.run(). @http.async_get/post/json added via httpx.

v0.9.1: Fix @raw (was never implemented — parser, ast_nodes, transpiler). Fix dict literal false positive in _eval_value (added _is_python_expression/_is_fstring_template helpers). No new features. No architecture changes.

v0.9.2: Pre-release cleanup. Namespace conflict fix (first wins, second gets existing ns back). Path traversal guard in @file.* and @json.read/write. HTTP timeout=30 on all sync requests. SSRF guard in @http.*. Version consistency across all files. Docs updated to v0.9 Stable. library.md translated to English.

v1.0.0: Named parameters (key=value args), friendly error hints, block plugin commands (api.block_command), context variables (__ctx__ / @ctx / @ctx.set), 139-test suite, PluginBlockNode, parse_plugin_block(). Stable plugin API.
v1.1.0: Plugin Foundation System — api.expose/consume/is_loaded/config, version-aware dependency checking, error attribution in plugin visitors, list_exposed_apis(). 150-test suite.
v1.2.0: Plugin gaps — scoped ctx (api.block_command scoped=True), node transforms (api.transform), block lifecycle hooks (api.block_hook), __ctx_stack__, __ph__. 156-test suite.
v1.3.0: Language completion — @with, @match/@case/@default, @del, @raise, multi-line expression fix. 172-test suite.

v1.4.0: Plugin system hardening — parse-time AST hooks (api.ast_hook), @async.for/@async.with, plugin error attribution, list_block_commands(), cruhon mods enrichment, cruhon new --plugin scaffold. 194-test suite.
v1.5.0: Plugin freedom — api.inject() (exec globals), api.inline_command() (inline expr plugins), api.eval_hook() (value evaluation). 210-test suite.
v1.6.0: Module system — @module/@export/@use/@from. Real encapsulation, file-based loading, circular dep detection, plugin compat. f-string template detection improved. 237-test suite.
